protocol_name: Language Policy for Wiki Pages & Agent Responses
description: Rules for page content language, section headers, and agent response translation.

rules.section_headers: All section titles in templates are English — ## Definition, ## Key Characteristics, etc. This provides consistent structural anchors regardless of content language.
rules.page_content_language: Content follows source language. Bilingual sources → bilingual sections (allowed and normal). No forced translation required at ingest time.
rules.agent_response_translation: When synthesizing answer: translate section headers to match user's question language. Content paraphrasing is agent's discretion — can quote directly, summarize, or translate.
rules.mixed_language_pages: Allowed and encouraged when reflecting bilingual sources. Agent treats each section independently for translation at response time.

agent_note: Headers stay English in templates. Response language matches user's question language. Mixed-language pages allowed.
